description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a natural light wood finish. The front features two vertically oriented doors, each with a pair of small round handles and a combination of solid wood and woven rattan or cane panels in the lower half. The upper half of the doors has glass or open panels revealing two interior shelves, providing both display and storage space. The sides and back are constructed from solid wood panels, with the back being completely flat and unadorned. The cabinet stands on four short, square legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its design is simple yet elegant, suitable for urban interiors such as entryways, living rooms, or offices.
description: A light wood cabinet with two doors, rattan or cane lower panels, and visible shelving behind glass or open upper panels. It stands on four short legs and features small round handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with round handles, upper glass or open panels, and lower rattan or cane panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with a horizontal seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wooden panel.
